name: product-spotlight
title: ProductSpotlightSection
description: Mobile-first product hero card carefully proportioned to fit almost exactly one viewport. Rounded product image, Playfair serif title, star rating row, description paragraph, peach-dotted feature bullets, price row with discount pill, and full-width CTA button.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
